import api from'./axiosInstance';// Get fee preview for a given amount
export const getFeePreview=amount=>api.get('/payments/fee-preview',{params:{amount}});// Create Razorpay order
export const createOrder=data=>api.post('/payments/create-order',data);// Verify payment after Razorpay checkout
export const verifyPayment=data=>api.post('/payments/verify',data);// Request refund for a payment
export const createRefund=data=>api.post('/payments/refund',data);// Get paginated payment history
export const getPaymentHistory=params=>api.get('/payments/history',{params});// Get single payment details
export const getPaymentDetails=paymentId=>api.get("/payments/".concat(paymentId));
